projects.name: AEOLUS
projects.subtitle: Autonomous Wind-Mapping Drone
projects.description: A self-navigating UAV that maps wind patterns in real-time using an array of pressure sensors and ML-based flow prediction. Built for Princeton Robotics Lab.

projects.name: SIGNAL/NOISE
projects.subtitle: RF Signal Classifier
projects.description: A real-time system that identifies and classifies radio frequency signals using software-defined radio and a custom neural network.

projects.name: PAPER TIGER
projects.subtitle: Origami-Inspired Deployable Structure
projects.description: Research exploring origami-based folding patterns for deployable aerospace structures. Compact for launch, expansive in orbit.

projects.name: VOLTAIC
projects.subtitle: High-Efficiency Solar MPPT Controller
projects.description: A maximum power point tracking controller for CubeSat solar panels, achieving 97.3% tracking efficiency.
